title: The Biggest Discount of the Year on Time In Status for monday.com for Black Friday!

posts.author: Mariia (Mariia Mykhasiuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Professionals and Team Leaders!

We have great news that will help you surgically optimize your workflows on monday.com, just in time for the peak season!

This Black Friday is your chance to acquire Time In Status for monday.com with an incredible discount. If you haven’t yet used our app, which accurately tracks task time and identifies bottlenecks in your processes - this is your perfect moment to start!

Exclusive Black Friday Offer for NEW Users:

Get 20% OFF on any Time In Status plan!

  • Valid for the full Annual Subscription (maximum savings!)
  • Or for the first 6 months of our flexible Monthly Subscription.

To get your discount, simply click the link and provide your Account Slug

Why Time In Status is Your Next Step to Efficiency:

  • No more guesswork, just real-time data on how long tasks spend in every status.
  • Easily identify where tasks get “stuck” and speed up your entire workflow.
  • Get a complete picture of team efficiency and SLA compliance.

Don’t Delay! This offer is valid only from November 21st to November 30th and is intended exclusively for new users.

If you have any questions, feel free to leave a comment - I’ll be happy to help!
